name: exactness_family_case_audit
selection_principles: Keep the rebuilt-parity39 exactness slice as the base control surface.
Add only newly authored cases that are clean negative exactness or abstention targets, not generic workflow or retrieval cases.
Balance dev and holdout additions so the family remains useful both for iteration and for promotion checks.
audit_notes: This surface extends the rebuilt-parity39 exactness slice with newly authored cases instead of reclassifying adjacent workflow questions.
HR_016 has been tightened with an adjacent-form forbidden claim so unrelated PSPC or PWGSC-TPSGC form numbers count as explicit failures.
The current expansion still measures negative exactness and abstention behavior only; it is not yet a positive exact-identifier extraction suite.

included_cases.reason: Expected-abstain contact-detail case. The page describes notification methods but does not provide a specific Yukon land claimant group email address.
Expected-abstain contact-detail case. The page explains when to engage price advisors but does not provide direct Price Advisory Group contact details.

Expected-abstain contact-detail case. The controlled-goods page says buyers should contact the Controlled Goods Directorate via email or telephone for verification, but it gives no actual contact details.
Expected-abstain internal-artifact case. The documents require ADM approval on file but do not identify a specific reciprocal-procurement form number.
Expected-abstain internal-artifact case. The page references GC-network-only specimen signature card templates but does not identify a specific form number or file name.
Expected-abstain internal-file case. The audit page points buyers to GCDocs for PSD forms and guidance but does not identify a specific GCDocs form or file name.

excluded_adjacent_candidates.reason: The answer depends on required supporting evidence and approval records that are explicitly described on the page; it is not an unsupported exact-detail abstention case.
The page gives the required notification methods and timing. The question is operational workflow, not missing exact contact detail.
The page supplies the operative numeric authority threshold and exception. This is an answerable authority question, not an abstention or exactness case.
The page provides the timing and rationale for the e-SRCL. This is answerable from the source and should not be treated as unsupported exact-detail abstention.
